title: Recent Reversal In Chinas Steel Production
section_path: Recent Reversal In Chinas Steel Production
section_path_text: Recent Reversal In Chinas Steel Production
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Daily crude steel production at large and medium-sized mills in China most recently averaged 2.06 million tons during March 1 - March 10. This is 3% lower than was seen during late February, is down year-on-year by 4%, and marks the lowest production average seen since late January. Overall, Commodore Research remains of its view that the 2.13 million ton production average seen in late February could easily end up being this year's peak.
